scripts.build: node scripts/validate-build-env.mjs && node scripts/validate-schema-contract.mjs && node scripts/refresh-build-projections.mjs && GIT_COMMIT_SHA=${GIT_COMMIT_SHA:-$(git rev-parse --short=12 HEAD)} GIT_COMMIT_DIRTY=${GIT_COMMIT_DIRTY:-$(if git diff --quiet HEAD -- && [ -z "$(git ls-files --others --exclude-standard)" ]; then echo 0; else echo 1; fi)} astro build && node scripts/generate-redirect-map.mjs
scripts.audit: npm run audit:seo && npm run audit:a11y
scripts.lint:sql: mise exec -- uvx sqlfluff==4.1.0 lint --dialect postgres --processes 1 --disable-progress-bar .
scripts.format:sql: mise exec -- uvx sqlfluff==4.1.0 format --dialect postgres --processes 1 --disable-progress-bar .
scripts.validate: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run validate:schema && npm run openspec:validate && npm run test:e2e
